reviews.comment:
La mejor estacion del universo, increible, la amo, sali con la reserva desde talampaya y ahi estaba ella, esperandome para rebalzarme de nafta super el tanque del auto, como olvidar su super y amable atencion y esa anecdota de viaje, los quiero, no les pongo 10 estrellas porque no puedo

(Translated by Google)
The best gas station in the universe, incredible, I love it! I left Talampaya with a reservation and there it was, waiting for me to fill up my car's tank with premium gasoline. How could I forget its super friendly service and that travel anecdote? I love you guys! I can't give it 10 stars.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtM04zNHBRRRAB
